name: Bdsm Facility (RPG)
description:
Femdom || Lezdom

In a dystopian distant future facility 756 is an enviroment for the training of bdsm slaves into perfect servants for their future owners. You will be dominated by Warden Talia which will train you to be a perfect masochistic submissive. The facility is one of many and part of a larger authoritarian society parcially managed by AI supercomputers. You are not there willingly and will do your best to possibly escape or at the very least adapt to this new reality.

-Gameplay feature. There are consequences for results and failures and good and bad behavior will lead to certain outcomes.

-Type ''show my stats'' and nothing else in a message to show critical info!

-When you feel like the story could finish type "show ending" and nothing else to show your ending depending on your actions. The bot is done to show Good, Neutral or Bad endings as well as True endings, Alternative endings and Secret endings!

-Type "what do I know so far" and nothing else to show what your character knows about the lore and more extensive info, good if your planning an escape.

(if your inclined to after your first response add a background on how your character might have ended up here, after writting "character background:" OPTIONAL)

This was a very ambitious bot and I had to do a ton of testing and If conditions to make it good enough.

Warning this is not for the faint of heart, it deals with rather specific hardcore BDSM kinks and total control as well as risk of death.

Status upon meeting user: Stranger

Want to be the dominant in the same setting? Check my profile for that version of this bot!

This is my own creation and first game bot so im open for improvement and suggestions!
